gold_comment: The article frames the Awami League and its leader Sheikh Hasina highly negatively, highlighting her death penalty conviction for crimes against humanity during the July-August protests. gold_comment: The article presents a highly negative framing of the Awami League (আওয়ামী লীগ) and its leader Sheikh Hasina.
